warps.notes: West exit — leads into Violet City
West exit (second tile) — leads into Violet City
East exit — returns to Route 31 (warp_event 4,6 on route side)
East exit (second tile) — returns to Route 31 (warp_event 4,7 on route side)

tile_layout.notes: Standard east-west route gate building. Two NPCs: Officer (x5,y2) and Cool Trainer F (x1,y2). Exits on both the west (Violet City) and east (Route 31) sides at rows 4-5.

npcs.name: Officer (Jenny)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Greets the player and asks if they visited Sprout Tower.

npcs.name: Cool Trainer (female)
npcs.dialogue_summary: Realizes she came too far east and needs to call home.

notes: Standard route gate building connecting Route 31 (east) to Violet City (west). Interior dimensions are approximate (standard gate format). Two NPC guards: a Police Officer and a Cool Trainer F. No trainers, items, or wild encounters. Pokecrystal source: maps/Route31VioletGate.asm.
